qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, EVA02_EVALUACION JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento = {%= #SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_evento %} AND {%? (#SOURCE:helper-mess/@id!='') {% PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = ({%= #SOURCE:helper-mess/@id %}) %} {% 1 = 2%} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AS IDD, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, EVA02_EVALUACION JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento = {%= #SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_evento %} AND {%? (#SOURCE:helper-mess/@code1!='') {% PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = ({%= #SOURCE:helper-mess/@code1 %}) %} {% 1 = 2 %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AS IDD, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, EVA02_EVALUACION JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento = {%= #SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_evento %} ')/ROWS/ROW
